title: Final Mouth — FCC-safe acoustic emission
motto: Synthesize any frequency internally; air output prioritizes spoken-word bands for humans and animals. RF stays on permitted FCC spectrum.
rule: Glottis may model full audible range — egress to listeners is clamped, leveled, and audience-prioritized.
rf_rule: Wireless voice relay uses field-rf-sentinel permitted bands only — never illegal carrier.

human.label: Human spoken word
human.teach: Telephone-band intelligibility + natural F0 — default for operator counsel.

animal_dog.label: Canine communication
animal_dog.teach: Bark/whine band — short bursts, avoid ultrasonic annoyance unless training recall.

animal_cat.label: Feline communication
animal_cat.teach: Meow/chirp/trill — higher formants than dog; keep egress gentle.

animal_horse.label: Equine communication
animal_horse.teach: Nickers and blows — low fundamental, nasal formants.

animal_bird.label: Avian communication
animal_bird.teach: Song/call — bright highs; clamp subsonic rumble.

operator.label: Close-talk operator
operator.teach: Headset proximity — truth gate binds to visible mouth.
